blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No obstructions, such as objects or shadows, are blocking the document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. The presence of these fields, along with the clear indication of a completed payment, confirms that this is an expense document. The expense type is classified as 'meals' based on the item descriptions. The document location is identified as Thailand, which does not match the expected location of China.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of 8 required fields, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. The presence of a total amount and payment confirmation via VISA indicates a completed transaction, meeting the criteria for an expense document.

issues.description: The supplier address is not in the correct format and location. It should be in Chinese and include the city and country.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show the business name of the supplier/vendor providing the goods or services

issues.description: The customer name is missing. It should show the employee name as the passenger/guest.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: For flights: itinerary must show employee name. For hotels: detailed bill must show guest name. For trains: ticket must show employee name

issues.description: The currency is in THB, but the expense should be in local currency (CNY).
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must display the total cost including all taxes and fees

issues.description: The tax amount is missing. It should show the tax amount and rate.

issues.recommendation: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch: Name: Sylvia Jiang, Office Address: 大连市高新园区高新街9号晟辉科技大厦703室, Tel.: +86 17615158127 or 0411-81760355 dial 808. Use S.F. Express paid by shipper and collect express fee invoice for reimbursement

issues.description: The total amount exceeds the tax-exempt limit for meals. Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt.
issues.recommendation: Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Personal Meal during Business Trips generally not exceeding 150 RMB/day/person is tax exempt. Set rates: 1st tier cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen) 200 yuan per day (80 yuan per meal lunch/dinner), new 1st tier and 2nd tier cities 150 yuan per day (60 yuan per meal), 3rd tier cities 100 yuan per day (40 yuan per meal). Meals exceeding limit treated as entertaining customers or reimbursed after withholding personal income tax

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance issues including missing mandatory fields, incorrect currency, and exceeding tax-exempt limits for meals. Additional documentation is required to be sent to the Local Employer's Dalian Branch.
